title: Core Models Path
description: Build fluency in Core Models inside Learning Paradigms by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Deep Supervision
steps.summary: Deep Supervision belongs to the Learning Paradigms area of AI/ML, within Core Models. It sits inside Learning Paradigms / Core Models. Start after Deep Q-Network.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Sim-to-Real Transfer
steps.summary: Sim-to-Real Transfer belongs to the Learning Paradigms area of AI/ML, within Core Models. It sits inside Learning Paradigms / Core Models. Compare it with Pseudo-Rehearsal and Process Supervision. It opens into Meta-Learning for Sim-to-Real Transfer.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Pseudo-Rehearsal
steps.summary: Pseudo-Rehearsal belongs to the Learning Paradigms area of AI/ML, within Core Models. It sits inside Learning Paradigms / Core Models. Compare it with Process Supervision and Deep Supervision.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Process Supervision
steps.summary: Process Supervision belongs to the Learning Paradigms area of AI/ML, within Core Models. It sits inside Learning Paradigms / Core Models. Compare it with Deep Supervision and Pseudo-Rehearsal.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Combinatorial Bandits
steps.summary: Combinatorial Bandits belongs to the Learning Paradigms area of AI/ML, within Core Models. It sits inside Learning Paradigms / Core Models. Compare it with Pseudo-Rehearsal and Process Supervision.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
